mapper.select: SELECT * FROM yaguang_uv_oil_product ORDER BY material_code ASC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM yaguang_uv_oil_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY material_code ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yaguang_uv_oil_product ( material_code, supplier_code, stock_code, material_name, usage, category, thickness, size, color, shape, responsible_person, min_sheet_size, max_sheet_size, min_dot, max_dot, min_line, max_line, min_spacing, max_spacing, min_pattern_area, max_pattern_area, applicable_product, structure_single_side, structure_double_side, structure_cover, structure_spine, structure_deboss, structure_inner_page, substrate_thickness, paper_surface_applicable, paper_surface_inapplicable, ink_surface_applicable, ink_surface_inapplicable, coating_surface_applicable, coating_surface_inapplicable, writing_standard_pen, writing_customer_pen, notes, is_active ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{stockCode}, #{materialName}, #{usage}, #{category}, #{thickness}, #{size}, #{color}, #{shape}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{minSheetSize}, #{maxSheetSize}, #{minDot}, #{maxDot}, #{minLine}, #{maxLine}, #{minSpacing}, #{maxSpacing}, #{minPatternArea}, #{maxPatternArea}, #{applicableProduct}, #{structureSingleSide}, #{structureDoubleSide}, #{structureCover}, #{structureSpine}, #{structureDeboss}, #{structureInnerPage}, #{substrateThickness}, #{paperSurfaceApplicable}, #{paperSurfaceInapplicable}, #{inkSurfaceApplicable}, #{inkSurfaceInapplicable}, #{coatingSurfaceApplicable}, #{coatingSurfaceInapplicable}, #{writingStandardPen}, #{writingCustomerPen}, #{notes}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE yaguang_uv_oil_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage = #{usage}, category = #{category}, thickness = #{thickness}, size = #{size}, color = #{color}, shape = #{shape}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_sheet_size = #{minSheetSize}, max_sheet_size = #{maxSheetSize}, min_dot = #{minDot}, max_dot = #{maxDot}, min_line = #{minLine}, max_line = #{maxLine}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, max_spacing = #{maxSpacing}, min_pattern_area = #{minPatternArea}, max_pattern_area = #{maxPatternArea}, applicable_product = #{applicableProduct}, structure_single_side = #{structureSingleSide}, structure_double_side = #{structureDoubleSide}, structure_cover = #{structureCover}, structure_spine = #{structureSpine}, structure_deboss = #{structureDeboss}, structure_inner_page = #{structureInnerPage}, substrate_thickness = #{substrateThickness}, paper_surface_applicable = #{paperSurfaceApplicable}, paper_surface_inapplicable = #{paperSurfaceInapplicable}, ink_surface_applicable = #{inkSurfaceApplicable}, ink_surface_inapplicable = #{inkSurfaceInapplicable}, coating_surface_applicable = #{coatingSurfaceApplicable}, coating_surface_inapplicable = #{coatingSurfaceInapplicable}, writing_standard_pen = #{writingStandardPen}, writing_customer_pen = #{writingCustomerPen}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility c LEFT JOIN yaguang_uv_oil_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY c.process_category ASC, c.display_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility c LEFT JOIN yaguang_uv_oil_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility (product_id, process_category, step_name, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{processCategory}, #{stepName}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility SET product_id = #{productId}, process_category = #{processCategory}, step_name = #{stepName}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, display_order = #{displayOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility (product_id, process_category, step_name, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.processCategory}, #{item.stepName}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM yaguang_uv_oil_compatibility c LEFT JOIN yaguang_uv_oil_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.step_name = #{stepName}
